pr.title: Record: 11L Int6 QAT + SmearGate + SWA + SAM: 1.1480 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d model combines int6 QAT, per-dim SmearGate, SAM, SWA, and Muon weight decay to stay quantization-friendly under 16MB.
techniques: Per-dimension SmearGate + SAM flatten the loss for robust int6 activations
SWA averaging with high Muon weight decay smooths weights before quantization
Sliding-window eval (stride 64) scores every token with full 2048 context
